goal: Brainstorm + spec + plan + start implementing trajectory-head v1 (single-Φ + object Procrustes + 21-joint hand, replacing the 4-head topology)

tasks_completed.summary: Extract _MotionLayer into hoi3r/models/heads/_layer.py — pure refactor, test passes, doc-fix follow-up commit restores 4RC provenance comments

tasks_pending.summary: HandTrajectoryHead — single-Φ joint output, random init via DiT identity-at-init

Cleanup legacy heads — gated on v1 ACP run ≥1000 steps

discoveries.title: Discussion notes reframed v1 as a video-conditioned canonical 4D correspondence field
discoveries.body: User's hoi3r_4rc_dcf_discussion_notes.md argues the 4-head HandGeom/ObjGeom/HandMotion/ObjMotion topology is the wrong mathematical object — it can learn mutually inconsistent {Φ(q,t), Φ(q,τ), Δ(q,t→τ)}. Single-Φ Φ(q,t) makes Δ derived: Δ(q,t→τ) := Φ(q,τ) − Φ(q,t), so cycle/transport composition holds by construction. This explains the cl=4-train→cl=16-eval 10× regression and the motion-grounding null result. v1 commits to the doc's §22 minimal scope (single-Φ + cycle + object Procrustes) plus encoder LoRA + scene loss. Hand LBS+residual deferred to v2.

discoveries.title: Pose-query mechanism = repurposed motion head
discoveries.body: Discovered that the legacy geom heads (HandGeomHead, ObjGeomHead) are tiny per-token MLPs with NO cross-attention to image features and NO time conditioning. The only mechanism for a query to look at frame-t image features is the motion head's CrossBlock + AdaLNBlock. So 'single-Φ pose-query' isn't a new architecture — it's a renamed motion head reinterpreted as per-frame Φ(q,t) decoder, with context = frame-t patches and time-cond = frame-t time token (no source/target asymmetry). AdaLN time-conditioning is inherited; nothing new to design.

discoveries.title: Hand 21 joints, not vertex samples
discoveries.body: Predicting 128 free xyz canonical samples per hand slot is intractable without articulated structure. v1 reduces hand identity space to 21 MANO joints — 6× smaller, well-supervised by GT, eligible for 2D-projection auxiliary loss. Vertex recovery is post-hoc via MANO joint-fit at eval (LBFGS over θ with β frozen). Lever-d (commit 269531b) already plumbed 21 joint GPS tokens; v1 elevates them from auxiliary to primary.

discoveries.title: PyTorch3D unavailable in human3r env
discoveries.body: Spec recommended pytorch3d.ops.corresponding_points_alignment for weighted Kabsch; verified it's not installed. Plan rolls our own via torch.linalg.svd (recipe in Task 4 of plan). Reference impl at stream3r/loss/dcf_losses.py:199- (unweighted).

discoveries.title: Object branch losses lock to exactly 2 terms
discoveries.body: L_final (Procrustes-projected output vs GT, weight 1.0) + L_raw_nll (per-point heteroscedastic NLL on noisy correspondences vs GT, weight 0.1). σ does double duty: NLL-supervised AND used as Procrustes weight (1/σ²). Symmetric YCB objects filtered (quotient loss deferred to v1.1). No explicit rotation or translation loss — point-on-surface loss already pins them.

module_state.state: 4-head topology stable; HandMotion/ObjMotion already mirror 4RC MotionDecoder (commit 58532a2); pt-ivn0p7l0 baseline runs on this
_MotionLayer extracted to _layer.py (T1 done); HandTrajectoryHead/ObjTrajectoryHead/Procrustes wrapper pending T2-T4
v1 will use LoRA(qkv,r=8,α=16) + scene heads unfrozen @ 0.1× LR + scene loss (depth 0.1, cam 0.05). Differs from pt-ivn0p7l0's frozen baseline.
v1 reduces from 128 canonical samples to 21 MANO joints; vertices via post-fit MANO at eval. Lever-d joint plumbing reused.
Unchanged — N_O canonical samples. Symmetric YCB filtered; quotient loss deferred to v1.1.
Structurally enforced by single-Φ. λ_cycle=0.01 kept as bf16-precision insurance.

caveats: v1 hand head predicts 21 joints, NOT vertices. Benchmark continuity for MPVPE is via post-fit MANO joint-fit at eval. Pure vertex prediction is v2's LBS+residual push.

Symmetric YCB filter list is empirical — initial set (master_chef_can, tomato_soup_can, mustard_bottle, banana) may need refinement once per-object Procrustes residual histograms are run on the manifest.
Discussion-notes §5 information-gain diagnostic (full-video vs single-frame ablation) deferred to a parallel side experiment post-v1, not skipped permanently.
ACP HMAC submission perms are scoped out (memory feedback_acp_hmac_permission_scope.md); when v1 is ready, surface the launcher to user for submission rather than retry HMAC.
Plan task 13 (delete legacy heads) is gated on v1 ACP run ≥1000 steps without crash — do not execute pre-emptively or pt-ivn0p7l0 comparison eval becomes hard to re-run.
